mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (project_id, date, time, venue, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{date}, #{time}, #{venue}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET project_id = #{projectId}, date = #{date}, time = #{time}, venue = #{venue}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.project_id, p.name as project_name, s.date, s.time, s.venue, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT s.id, s.project_id, p.name as project_name, s.date, s.time, s.venue, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id ORDER BY s.date ASC, s.time ASC

SELECT s.id, s.project_id, p.name as project_name, s.date, s.time, s.venue, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE s.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY s.date ASC, s.time ASC

SELECT s.id, s.project_id, p.name as project_name, s.date, s.time, s.venue, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN project p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE s.status = '未开始' ORDER BY s.date ASC, s.time ASC LIMIT 10
